options.name: --archive-file-path
options.description: Output path of the ZIP archive to create. [Required]

options.name: --source-paths
options.description: One or more files or directories to archive. [Required]

options.name: --encrypt
options.description: Prompt for a password and create an encrypted ZIP archive.

options.name: --no-dir-entries
options.description: Do not create entries for directories.
